steps.title: Recognize the example
steps.content: The first sentence states a general principle: sleek vehicles are more aerodynamic than bulkier ones. The next sentence points to the streamlined nose of the Airbus A320 as a specific case of that principle.

steps.title: Reject the wrong links
steps.content: Choice B merely adds another point instead of introducing an example. Choice C suggests simultaneous events, not an example relationship. Choice D signals contrast, but the A320 supports rather than contradicts the general statement. The answer is A.
